# Applying a Code

A promotional code is entered in the dedicated field on the checkout page, and only one code can be applied per order. A code that fails to apply usually has either an unmet minimum order value or a category restriction that excludes one or more products in the cart.

[Source: promo_codes.md#applying-a-code]
